domain.description: Registrable domain (eTLD+1), lowercase, no scheme or www.

passkey_signin.description: Passkeys can be used for passwordless sign-in.

passkey_mfa.description: Passkeys can be used as a second factor.

additional_domains.description: Other registrable domains the same account/sign-in covers.

region.description: 'global', or an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for sites that are predominantly local to one market. Lets country lists surface locally-popular sites that no global-rank-capped directory carries.

documentation.description: URL to the site's passkey/2FA setup documentation.

sources.description: Provenance. CC-BY/MIT imports MUST retain their origin here for attribution.
